agent.runner_summary: Runs the SkyServe airline support agent through the simulator adapter. FixedTurn.content is the raw user message string passed to the agent for one turn.

components.when_to_use: Scenarios about looking up a booking by confirmation code, including unknown or invalid codes.
components.input_guidance: Pass the confirmation_code argument (e.g. "SKY123"). Codes are normalized to uppercase.
components.output_guidance: Evaluate the booking summary string, or the not-found message for unknown codes.

components.when_to_use: Scenarios about baggage allowance for a given ticket type.
components.input_guidance: Pass the ticket_type argument (e.g. "standard", "basic", "business"); defaults to "standard".
components.output_guidance: Evaluate the baggage policy string returned for the ticket type.

components.when_to_use: Scenarios about changing a seat on an existing booking; verify the agent asks for and validates the confirmation code first.
components.input_guidance: Pass confirmation_code and requested_seat arguments. Mock this tool in agent scenarios so the in-memory booking state is not mutated.
components.output_guidance: Evaluate the seat-update confirmation string, or the message requiring a valid confirmation code.

log_notes: Tool calls appear in the transcript as lookup_booking, baggage_policy, or change_seat with their JSON arguments.
The agent is instructed to ask for and verify a confirmation code before discussing a specific booking or changing a seat.
The agent must not invent refund amounts, flight availability, fees, or policy exceptions.
learning_env_guidance: The adapter-facing input is a raw user message string; put that string directly in FixedTurn(content=...).

The agent uses the OpenAI Agents SDK. It selects the OpenAI default model when OPENAI_API_KEY is set, otherwise the LiteLLM Anthropic model (litellm/anthropic/claude-sonnet-5) when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set. Prefer OPENAI_API_KEY for LLM judge, persona, and generated-input models.
